header.subtitle: Offline search and Q&A over your local documents
chat.title: Questions (local AI RAG)
chat.shortcutsHint: Shortcuts: Ctrl+Enter sends the question · press "?" to see all shortcuts.
search.title: Keyword search (no AI)
search.imageHint: Requires a CLIP ONNX model configured in Settings (ClipModelPath).
documents.title: Indexed documents
study.title: Study — AI-generated flashcards and quiz
study.docPathPlaceholder: paste a document path from the Documents tab
dashboard.title: Dashboard
config.folderPath: Path to the folder with your documents
config.uploadHint: The browser does not expose the full path of dropped files, so they are uploaded to a dedicated subfolder inside the index folder (_uploads) and can then be indexed normally.
config.dropZone: Drag files here or click to select
config.shortcutsHint: Default shortcuts: / focuses search · Ctrl+Enter sends the chat question · Ctrl+K focuses global search · Esc closes modals. Click "Capture" and press the desired key to customize.
config.title: Settings
config.modelPath: Local AI model path (.gguf) — used when provider is LlamaSharp
config.ollamaUrl: Ollama server URL — used when provider is Ollama
config.ocrEnabled: Enable OCR (Tesseract) for images and scanned PDFs
config.embeddingsEnabled: Enable embeddings and hybrid search (BM25 + vector similarity)
config.rerankingEnabled: Enable result re-ranking with a cross-encoder model
config.sttEnabled: Enable audio transcription (.wav 16kHz mono) via Whisper
config.piiRedaction: Redact personal data (SSN-like IDs, email, phone, card) before indexing
config.gpuLayers: Model layers on GPU (0 = CPU only)
config.parallelism: Files processed in parallel during indexing
config.incrementalIndexing: Incremental indexing (skip unchanged files since last run)
config.autoReindex: Automatically reindex when changes are detected in the documents folder
config.llmFallback: Automatic LLM fallback (Ollama first, local LLamaSharp as backup)
agent.title: Agent with tools (web search and calculator)
agent.warning: WARNING: enabling this lets the assistant decide on its own to make external network calls (web search) to answer questions, outside QuestResume's default offline-first behavior. Only enable it if you trust the search service configured below.
agent.enable: Enable agent tools (calculator and web search)
agent.endpoint: Web search service URL (e.g. self-hosted SearXNG, ?format=json)
webhooks.title: Webhooks and notifications
webhooks.hint: Register a URL to receive a JSON POST whenever an event happens: indexing completed, document error, or question answered.
extractTable.title: Extract table
error.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
error.noIndex: No index found. Index a folder first.
error.modelNotConfigured: Configure the AI model in Settings before asking.
